summary: Completed frontend testing of Global Access shipping website with Supabase authentication. Successfully tested user registration, dashboard loading, public tracking, and navigation flows.

authentication_issues.issue: User session not persisting after registration - user gets logged out when navigating

passed_tests: Frontend loading and landing page display
Registration form field validation and data-testid selectors
User registration with Supabase Auth (email: test1774375958@test.com)
AuthContext profile creation with retry logic
Dashboard UI elements (stats cards, sidebar, user profile)
Public tracking functionality with error handling
Track Shipment header navigation to #tracking section
Login page navigation and form elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue - users are getting logged out after registration when trying to navigate to other pages. The AuthContext and Supabase session management needs to be reviewed to ensure sessions persist properly across page navigation.
